overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic urban environment with brutalist architecture. The player descends stairs from an NCART station, walks along streets and elevated walkways under highway overpasses, and enters a dark concrete tunnel.

events.description: descends stairs and exits building interior to street level

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs toward street level while facing a character coming down

notable_agents.action: descending stairs toward camera wearing hooded jacket and tactical gear

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow safety lines descending from NCART station
silver metal handrail along left side of stairs
silver metal handrail along right side of stairs
futuristic transit station building with NCART signage visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside an NCART station stairwell. The player descends concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides, approaching a character in tactical gear coming down from the station above. Natural light streams in from the exit at street level ahead.

events.description: white jeep and orange vehicle pass by on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along concrete sidewalk under the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: multi-lane city street with yellow dividing lines running parallel to sidewalk
massive concrete building with geometric patterns and glass facade sections
concrete overpass structure casting shadows on the street below
tall modern street lamp along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell, the scene opens to a sunlit urban street under an elevated highway. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk as vehicles including a white jeep pass by on the right. A massive brutalist office building rises on the right, while the NCART station recedes to the left rear.

events.description: transitions to elevated pedestrian walkway with glass and metal railing overlooking cityscape
passes by pedestrian in blue sleeveless shirt walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway with views of waterfront and distant towers to the left

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction wearing blue sleeveless shirt

entered.detail: safety barrier with horizontal metal bars and glass panels overlooking lower levels
distant view of ocean water and coastline visible between buildings
tall building with vibrant green and red neon signage visible in distance
stack of wooden shipping pallets sitting under the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions to an elevated pedestrian path with glass and metal railings on the left overlooking the waterfront. The brutalist office building now looms closer on the right. The player passes a pedestrian in a blue shirt and continues toward a darker tunnel entrance ahead, with palm trees and colorful distant towers visible to the left.

events.description: enters dark tunnel underpass with artificial lighting replacing sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking into dark concrete tunnel with artificial lighting, approaching distant exit

entered.detail: large dark opening in the concrete structure leading to enclosed passageway
smooth gray concrete walls of the tunnel interior
distant lights illuminating the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark concrete tunnel, transitioning from bright daylight to low artificial lighting. The elevated highway deck becomes the tunnel ceiling above. The walkway continues straight through the enclosed passage with concrete walls on both sides, heading toward a distant light at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright transit station down into the shadowed depths of a brutalist urban corridor. It begins with a descent down concrete stairs within an NCART station, moving past a tactical operative toward the natural light of the street level. As the camera exits the stairwell, the environment opens into a sunlit city street beneath an elevated highway, passing a white jeep and a massive concrete office building. The path then transitions onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings that overlook a waterfront dotted with palm trees and distant colorful towers. Finally, the scene shifts from bright daylight into a dark concrete tunnel, where the highway deck becomes a ceiling and the camera moves through low artificial lighting toward a distant exit.
